sentence: Sam was breaking the vase, and the pieces scattered across the floor.
Mara was shattering the window, and glass sprayed across the room.
Devin was melting the snowman, and a puddle spread across the lawn.
Priya was tearing the page, and the two halves came apart in her hands.
Lena was cracking the egg, and yolk ran down the side of the bowl.
Omar was dissolving the tablet, and the water turned cloudy.
